task_description: Phase 16 Trust & Safety: Replace placeholder regex moderation with real ML-based moderation (OpenAI API integration), add abuse graph with sybil detection, reputation system, anti-spam, configurable rate limiting, captcha challenger, and a moderation worker service that processes content asynchronously.

verification.summary: 162 tests pass across 21 test files in packages/moderation, packages/security, services/moderation-worker, and packages/queue. All placeholder regex patterns removed. Two review cycles completed with all issues addressed.
